ops.title: Fleet migration complete: root .gitignore is a cc-guides-managed artifact (44/44)
ops.body:
Executed 2026-07-20 (session e9a3a2be). Root cause chain: gd-build commit 7de02a24 added fleet-theme.css materialization to `docs/assets/.gd-build/` but the ignore entry only shipped to cc-steer → captain-hook's jj snapshot picked up the CSS → decision to make the whole root .gitignore fleet-managed.

**What shipped:**
- cc-guides v0.1.42: new `gitignore` artifact kind (cc-guides d3f0be22) — dispatch keys on `.gitignore` as the extension (filepath.Ext returns the whole dotfile name), catAppend, `# ` marker, no grammar. Root and nested (docs/.gitignore) targets both work.
- cc-skills 65ccbdd0: pack fragments `gitignore-{base,python,go,swift,bun,docs}` under plugin/guides/gitignore/; docs fragment generalizes the gd-build rule to any-depth `.gd-build/`. Plus repo-bootstrap 0.58.0: .gitignore scaffolds as a layout dir (base → layers → docs → gitignore-local LAST), gitignore_concat transform + templates deleted, scratch-dir guard re-homed to tests/test_guides_fragments.py.
- All 44 lock-carrying fleet repos migrated, each with GENERATED-marker .gitignore, lock at 0.1.42, coverage-probe-verified (every old pattern still ignored), Guides CI green. Migration commits titled "gitignore: migrate to cc-guides-managed artifact…".

**Policy decisions (bind future lanes):**
- Coverage probe outranks the marker heuristic: cc-present dropped gitignore-bun because its any-depth `dist/` defeats `!internal/web/dist/.gitkeep` (git cannot re-include below an excluded parent); the bun lines ride verbatim in gitignore-local. Recurrable class: negated keepfiles under fragment-ignored dirs.
- gitignore-local is always LAST (negations win). Residue keeps root-anchored variants (e.g. `/target`) when the fragment's rule is directory-only or root-anchored differently.
- Non-standard stacks (Elixir fly-me-to-the-moon) = base + full residue; nested-only markers still count for fragment selection unless the probe objects.
- Retrofit renders need `--force` once per repo ("refusing to overwrite a handwritten file cc-guides does not manage: .gitignore").
- Secondary jj workspaces have no .git: verify in a throwaway git-init dir, watch CI from the main checkout, `ccx vcs ship --bookmark main` when another bookmark shares the tip.

Related: note 6fa8ce36 (capt-hook v11 coordination — the feared fleet cron breakage never materialized; consumers were already clean everywhere but captain-hook's stale base). Known transitional state: captain-hook's shared default @ still shows `A docs/assets/.gd-build/fleet-theme.css` until the concurrent session rebases onto new main, then one `jj file untrack` clears it.
